examples: While he holds Barcelona's Ballon d'Or winner Messi in very high regard, he would have preferred another player to scoop the award.
I got the inside scoop on his new girlfriend.
Scoop out the rotten part of the pear.
The image was taken after the sample was transferred from the drill to the rover's scoop.
Such funds can scoop up BRIC bargains as they arise, without being confined there.
